title: Battle-Loop Scheduler, Allocation, and Idle-Work Rescue

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: No gameplay allocation added; v0.112 leaves timer semantics intact.
safeOptimizations: Keep existing timer tick; avoid extra diagnostic work when paused.
schedulerMap.profilerEvidence: v0.110 phase rows include simulationClock as a measured phase.

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: Camera work depends on commands and follow state.
safeOptimizations: Private diagnostics can pause for measurement only.

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: Cooldown and cast state remain gameplay-critical.

schedulerMap.cadence: every active frame when movement or separation can matter
schedulerMap.allocationPosture: v0.112 removes idle grid construction when no units move and no same-team overlap exists.
safeOptimizations: Skip grid creation on idle non-overlap frames; keep buff updates.
unsafeOptimizations: Changing path outputs, repath cooldowns, or separation results.
schedulerMap.profilerEvidence: v0.110 Tier M showed movement/pathing as non-trivial incremental work.

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: v0.112 removes attacker spread/filter allocations only.
safeOptimizations: Build attacker list with loops preserving order.
unsafeOptimizations: Changing target priority, cooldowns, projectile timing, or damage.

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: v0.112 skips empty carriers and avoids expiry filter unless needed.
safeOptimizations: Return a shared empty tick result for no-op carriers.
unsafeOptimizations: Changing tick interval, duration, or damage.
schedulerMap.profilerEvidence: v0.110 Tier M top phase frequently reported status effects.

unsafeOptimizations: Changing income, training, upgrades, or repairs.
schedulerMap.profilerEvidence: v0.110 density rows report economy/production cost.

schedulerMap.cadence: every active frame when a Lume network exists
schedulerMap.allocationPosture: No balance or state rule change; linked_ward remains 0.92.
safeOptimizations: Keep render cache separate from state.
unsafeOptimizations: Changing benefit value, activation, rewards-disabled, or tutorial exclusion.

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: v0.112 reuses vision-source slots and current-source copies.
safeOptimizations: Loop source construction; keep source snapshot copy inside FogOfWarSystem.
unsafeOptimizations: Changing reveal radius, cell state, or cadence.
schedulerMap.profilerEvidence: v0.110 fog rows and v0.111 clean-profile comparison.

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: v0.112 uses a cell visitor for overlay/signature work.
unsafeOptimizations: Skipping entity visibility when cells or entity visibility can change.

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: Existing stable-region patching retained; v0.112 reports hidden-panel gate as tested helper.
safeOptimizations: Avoid unchanged DOM patches; keep local-panel wakeups.
unsafeOptimizations: Suppressing command availability or status changes.
schedulerMap.profilerEvidence: v0.110 HUD DOM top signal in static rows.

schedulerMap.allocationPosture: v0.112 replaces snapshot filter/map/spread chains with ordered loops.
safeOptimizations: Loop marker construction; retain marker order and visibility rules.
unsafeOptimizations: Changing fog visibility, marker order, or camera math.
Changing dedupe priority or gameplay warnings.

schedulerMap.cadence: only when private phase profiler is on
schedulerMap.allocationPosture: v0.112 stops count-snapshot construction while profiler is disabled.
safeOptimizations: Check enabled before creating count snapshot.
unsafeOptimizations: Collecting profiler counters in public/default runtime.

allocationAudit.evidence: Before used three filter/map arrays plus a spread return every fog tick.
allocationAudit.optimization: Reusable source slots filled by ordered loops.

allocationAudit.evidence: Before cloned source objects with sources.map each update.
allocationAudit.optimization: Copy source fields into reusable current-source slots.

allocationAudit.evidence: Before cells().filter().map().join() and cells().forEach allocated cell snapshots.
allocationAudit.optimization: Use FogOfWarSystem.forEachCell for overlay and signature traversal.

allocationAudit.evidence: Before every empty carrier still allocated a filtered statusEffects array.
allocationAudit.optimization: Skip empty carriers and filter only when an effect expires.

allocationAudit.evidence: Before grid/static obstacle arrays were built before checking for movement.
allocationAudit.optimization: Tick buffs, then skip grid when no move target and no same-team overlap exists.

allocationAudit.evidence: Before spread + filter rebuilt attacker candidates.
allocationAudit.optimization: Build the single attacker list with loops preserving unit then building order.

allocationAudit.evidence: Before each marker group used filter/map and spread composition.
allocationAudit.optimization: Build markers with ordered loops and retain objective-site Set.

allocationAudit.evidence: Before count snapshots were constructed even when phase profiling was disabled.
allocationAudit.optimization: Check profiler enabled before building count snapshots; loop private counters.

parityChecks.evidence: Browser idle matrix keeps save snapshots unchanged before and after each private scenario.
v0.112 does not change AI decisions, path search outputs, replay state, or launch fixtures.
Unit test asserts linked_ward damageTakenMultiplier remains exactly 0.92.
No save schema, stable ID, content, art, or package metadata field is changed by runtime code.
